mapper.insert: insert into address(user_id, sex, label, phone, consignee, province_code, province_name, city_code, city_name, district_code, district_name, detail, is_default) values (#{userId}, #{sex}, #{label}, #{phone}, #{consignee}, #{provinceCode}, #{provinceName}, #{cityCode}, #{cityName}, #{districtCode}, #{districtName}, #{detail}, #{isDefault})
